channel.title: Taiwanese on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Taiwanese on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: Pine and Crane
item.description: Pine & Crane hasn’t been around for very long and is located in the Silver Lake area on Sunset where a plethora of restaurants sits. It’s generally difficult to find decent Chinese restaurants, let alone Taiwanese, outside of the San Gabriel Valley. So I thought I would trek here to see what the hype is about. This is #21 of 52 of my 2014 LA food expedition. I’m almost half way there.
